C:\Users\yasmi\Documents\imac\winlibs\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ex3.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\yasmi\Documents\imac\winlibs\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\ex3.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ex3.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\yasmi\Documents\imac\winlibs\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ex3.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o "C:\imac\prog algo\s2\td3\bin\Debug\ex3.exe" -Wl,--out-implib,libex3.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ex3.dir\linkLibs.rsp
